description_long: This is a cylindrical plastic bottle with a wide, flat, gray screw cap that sits atop the main body. The bottle features a white exterior with a large, curved label that wraps around most of its surface, displaying text in Cyrillic and teal accent graphics. The front of the label includes a prominent teal section with the product name and additional information, while the back contains detailed instructions, a barcode, and more text. The bottle appears to be empty, as there is no visible liquid or content inside. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of pharmaceutical or medical bottles. There are no visible signs of damage, and the cap is separated from the body, suggesting it is removable.
description: A white cylindrical plastic bottle with a gray screw cap and a teal-accented label featuring Cyrillic text, commonly used for pharmaceuticals.
description_view_0: Front view showing the teal-accented label with Cyrillic text and the separated gray screw cap above.
description_view_1: Back view displaying detailed instructions, a barcode, and additional text on the label, with the cap above.
description_view_2: Side view with the label mostly turned away, showing a plain white surface and the cap above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal label visible, mostly plain white surface and the cap above.
attribute_label_or_branding: The label is white with teal accents and contains Cyrillic text, including the product name 'Неодолпасс' and additional information, as well as a barcode and instructions on the back.
